title: A Diplomatic Mission
overview: After getting in some trouble, Akira gets approached by an enigmatic recruiter who tells him about the expendable foot soldiers known as Yakitori.

title: Counterattack
overview: Ten months ago, Tyrone Baxter, Erland Martonen, Amalia Schulz, Zihan Yang and Akira Ihotsu meet for the first time on Earth before launching to Mars.

title: Harassment
overview: The K321 unit heads into enemy territory to carry out their "harassment" mission while 10 months ago, back in the Kitchen, their training begins.

title: Atrocity
overview: Back in the Kitchen, the K321 learn that their teamwork is lacking, and they find out that they're being trained differently from everyone else.

title: The Rear Guard
overview: After their brutal counter-attack against the enemy, the K321 unit are left to put together their own escape plan. Akira has a risky idea.

title: Yakitori
overview: After risking their lives for Shoren, the K321 unit are scapegoated and arrested. During their trial, Vasa Pupkin testifies as a witness.
